hook.text: The pipeline takes 45 minutes. Nobody knows which step is the bottleneck. They just wait and complain.

buildup.text: Pipeline observability means treating your CI/CD like a production system — with metrics and dashboards.

discovery.text: Track stage durations, failure rates, queue wait times, and flaky test percentages. Data reveals the truth.

twist.text: A flaky test that fails 5% of the time wastes more team time than a slow but reliable test suite.

climax.text: Datadog CI Visibility and Buildkite Analytics show exactly where pipeline time goes. Optimize what you measure.

punchline.text: Measure your pipeline like a product. Optimize what's slow.

quiz.question: Why is tracking flaky test rates important for pipeline health?
options: Flaky tests waste more team time than consistently slow tests
Flaky tests always indicate a critical production bug
Flaky tests cost more money to run than stable tests
